price_notes: Dry/extensive parcels 8000 to 20000 EUR/ha; irrigated Alqueva-zone land 25000 to 45000 EUR/ha; Portugal national arable mean 11827 EUR/ha (Eurostat 2024).
appreciation_notes: Dossier states trajectory firmly upward as wine, olive, almond and regen-investment demand intensifies.
source: Idealista Alentejo listings Q4 2024 to Q1 2025; CBRE Property Handbook 2024; Savills Global Farmland September 2024; Eurostat agricultural land prices 2024 release

price_notes: Dry pasture/rough land 3000 to 8000 EUR/ha; prado/labradio productive parcels 8000 to 18000 EUR/ha; Ribeira Sacra and Rias Baixas vineyard land 40000 to 80000+ EUR/ha; Spain national mean 10248 EUR/ha (+2.8% YoY).
appreciation_notes: Spain national agricultural mean 2024 up 2.8% YoY current prices per MAPA.
source: MAPA Encuesta de Precios de la Tierra 2024; Vinetur 2024

price_notes: Pasture/marginal 4000 to 7000 EUR/ha; general arable 7000 to 10000 EUR/ha; top-quality irrigated Mures basin 12000 to 18000 EUR/ha; Romania national average 8656 EUR/ha.
appreciation_notes: National rises of ~4% in 2024 and ~25 to 40% cumulative over the prior decade per INS Romania.
source: INS Romania Agricultural land prices 2024; PBS Worldwide / NAI Romania commentary 2025
gaps: Smaller-parcel sales in remote Carpathian villages often transact below INS averages and are not fully captured.

price_notes: West region (Galway/Mayo/Roscommon) median 7027 EUR/acre (~17360 EUR/ha), Ireland's most affordable; Cork region 17875 EUR/acre (~44200 EUR/ha); national median 9988 EUR/acre (~24680 EUR/ha); marginal Connemara mountain/bog often below 5000 EUR/acre. Per-acre to per-ha via /0.4047.
appreciation_notes: National YoY change 2023 to 2024 +10.3% per CSO Ireland.
source: CSO Ireland Agricultural Land Prices 2024 (released November 2025); SCSI/Teagasc Agricultural Land Market Review 2024 to 2025
gaps: Connemara-specific medians not separately broken out in CSO release.

price_notes: Pembrokeshire bare-land 8000 to 11000 GBP/acre (~19770 to 27180 GBP/ha) for mixed/grass; Wales/England average 9152 GBP/acre (~22605 GBP/ha); prime parcels can reach 20000+ GBP/acre. Per-acre to per-ha via /0.4047.
appreciation_notes: Marginal rise from 9152 to 9164 GBP/acre Q4 2024 to early 2025 per Knight Frank Farmland Index.
source: Knight Frank Farmland Index Q4 2024; Farmers Weekly Farmland in your area 2024 Wales
gaps: No direct Pembrokeshire-only Knight Frank URL cited; figures aggregated from Wales/England index.

price_notes: Lozere 5480 EUR/ha (+8.1% YoY); Ardeche ~5500 to 7000 EUR/ha (2023); Aude 6360 EUR/ha; Herault 7900 EUR/ha; Gard 13240 EUR/ha (wine-zone weighted); Occitanie regional free-land average 7280 EUR/ha.
appreciation_notes: Lozere +8.1% YoY in 2024; SAFER notes very strong growth in the Cevennes and Causses.
source: SAFER 2024 Bareme indicatif de la valeur venale moyenne des terres agricoles; Agreste
gaps: No explicit URL cited for SAFER bareme in dossier.

price_notes: North-East Italy agricultural land average 47100 EUR/ha (Eurostat 2024); South Tirol DOC vineyards Val Venosta/Isarco 300000 to 500000 EUR/ha; Lake Caldaro 600000 to 1100000 EUR/ha; Italy national mean ~22400 EUR/ha (+1% YoY).
appreciation_notes: Italy national agricultural mean ~+1% YoY 2024 per CREA; supply constrained by maso chiuso regime keeping prices elevated.
source: Eurostat Agricultural land prices 2024 release; CREA 2024; Italian wine-press summaries / WineNews 2024
gaps: Mountain pasture (Almweide) values heavily distorted by maso chiuso and rarely transact on open market.

price_notes: Asturias regional mean 9742 EUR/ha (MAPA 2024); permanent pasture 5000 to 10000 EUR/ha; arable 10000 to 15000 EUR/ha; mountain marginal land often 1500 to 4000 EUR/ha; Spain national average 10248 EUR/ha (+2.8% YoY).
appreciation_notes: Spain national agricultural mean 2024 up 2.8% YoY per MAPA.
source: MAPA Encuesta de Precios de la Tierra 2024
gaps: Asturias-specific figure is an MAPA aggregated mean; underlying variance by valley and use-class is wide. No direct URL cited in Asturias legal.md.

price_notes: Average purchase price for Ackerland 22022 EUR/ha; Bodenrichtwert 2.00 EUR/m2 = 20000 EUR/ha (stable YoY); Magdeburger Borde black-earth substantially higher; rental 429 EUR/ha.
appreciation_notes: Bodenrichtwert reported as stable YoY 2024 per Gutachterausschuss Sachsen-Anhalt.
source: agrarheute / Bauernzeitung 2024 analysis citing state statistics office; Gutachterausschuss Sachsen-Anhalt 2024
gaps: No direct URL cited for agrarheute or Gutachterausschuss in dossier.

price_notes: Pasture 2000 to 4000 EUR/ha; general arable 3500 to 5500 EUR/ha; prime Tartu/Viljandi/Jarva county exceeds 6000 to 8000 EUR/ha; Eurostat 2024 indicated +10 to 15% range 2023 to 2024 for Baltics.
appreciation_notes: Eurostat 2024 release indicated Estonia among Baltic states with rising land prices in +10 to 15% range 2023 to 2024.
source: Land in Estonia / Eesti Maavara industry reporting 2024; Land Board Maa-amet transaction data 2023
gaps: Comprehensive 2024 national average not yet released by Statistics Estonia at time of writing; figures interpolated from 2023 published data and industry sources.

price_notes: Oregon farm real estate average 2380 USD/acre (5880 USD/ha); unimproved timber/foothills 1500 to 4000 USD/acre (3700 to 9880 USD/ha); Willamette Valley irrigated cropland 8000 to 16000 USD/acre (19760 to 39530 USD/ha). Western Oregon costs 3 to 5x the Alentejo baseline. Per-acre to per-ha via /0.4047.
appreciation_notes: Dossier states land prices rising driven by regen-culture demand premium, climate-haven migration, and California capital.
source: USDA NASS Land Values 2024 Summary (August 2024); Farmer Mac 2024 U.S. Farmland Values Report Oregon section

price_notes: Vermont farm real estate average 4350 USD/acre (~10750 USD/ha); forested/recreational rural 500 to 2000 USD/acre (1235 to 4940 USD/ha); buildable rural with utilities 5000 to 20000 USD/acre (12355 to 49420 USD/ha). Current Use Program assesses agricultural at 483 USD/acre and forest at 188 USD/acre for tax. Per-acre to per-ha via /0.4047.
source: USDA NASS Land Values 2024 Summary (August 2024); Vermont Department of Taxes FY2024
gaps: Dossier does not provide a Vermont-specific YoY appreciation rate.

price_notes: Western North Carolina unimproved rural farmland/forest 5000 to 15000 USD/acre (12350 to 37060 USD/ha); parcels with road access/views/Asheville proximity 15000 to 30000 USD/acre (37000 to 74100 USD/ha); Buncombe County can reach 50000+ USD/acre; NC statewide farm real estate average 5150 USD/acre. Per-acre to per-ha via /0.4047.
appreciation_notes: NC farmland up 8.4% YoY in 2024 per USDA NASS, one of the highest appreciation rates in the Southeast.
source: USDA NASS Land Values 2024 Summary; unityknows.com 2025 residential land analysis; Conserving Carolina market commentary 2024

price_notes: Wisconsin cropland 6800 USD/acre (16800 USD/ha); overall farm real estate 6120 USD/acre (15100 USD/ha); Driftless-specific mixed/wooded parcels 3500 to 6500 USD/acre (8600 to 16000 USD/ha) depending on slope, road access, tillable proportion. Per-acre to per-ha via /0.4047.
appreciation_notes: Wisconsin cropland up 180 USD/acre from 2023 to 2024 per USDA NASS; dossier notes Viroqua-La Farge-Cashton land values rising due to organic premium.
source: USDA NASS Wisconsin Cash Rent and Land Values 2024; Vernon County transaction data from Farmland Intel and local listings 2024

price_notes: Arkansas farm real estate average 4110 USD/acre (10160 USD/ha); recreational/timberland 2000 to 5000 USD/acre (4940 to 12350 USD/ha); Sharp/Izard counties offer raw land at 1000 to 3000 USD/acre (2470 to 7410 USD/ha); cheapest rural land of any region in this slate per dossier. Per-acre to per-ha via /0.4047.
source: USDA NASS Land Values 2024 Summary; Arkansas Farm Bureau Land Values 2024; Mossy Oak Properties Arkansas data; Shamrock Lands 2024 to 2025 market data
gaps: Dossier does not provide an explicit YoY appreciation rate for Ozark land.

price_notes: Taos County median listing 12846 USD/acre (~31740 USD/ha); average on listed properties ~23529 USD/acre (~58137 USD/ha); USDA NASS 2025 New Mexico statewide farm real estate average 725 USD/acre (~1791 USD/ha, lowest statewide agricultural average in continental US). Per-acre to per-ha via /0.4047.
appreciation_notes: Dossier notes regen network visibility has attracted land speculators and short-term vacation rental operators inflating land values.
source: LandSearch market data 2024 to 2025; USDA NASS 2025 New Mexico statewide; LandBoss 2026 Guide
gaps: No systematic published price series for pure rangeland/dryland Taos parcels; Taos median reflects amenity premium not pure agricultural utility.

price_notes: Nova Scotia agricultural land 3913 CAD/acre (2023, ~9670 CAD/ha); ~4120 CAD/acre (~10180 CAD/ha) in late 2024; Cape Breton (Inverness/Victoria counties) undeveloped rural often 500 to 2000 CAD/acre. Figures shown are per-acre; per-ha conversion via /0.4047.
appreciation_notes: FCC 2024 Farmland Values Report recorded 5.3% appreciation in 2024; first-half 2025 +1.0% (decelerating).
source: Farm Credit Canada 2024 Farmland Values Report (published March 2025); Statistics Canada series 32-10-0047-01
gaps: Per-ha conversion not explicitly stated in dossier; Cape Breton transaction prices vary enormously by road access and water.

price_notes: Kootenay ALR farmland 15000 to 45000 CAD/acre (~37000 to 111200 CAD/ha) for cultivated valley benches; raw/Class 5 parcels 3000 to 12000 CAD/acre (~7410 to 29650 CAD/ha); 2018 mean 45073 CAD/acre with 90% of sales in 4400 to 23900 CAD/acre range; comparable acreage costs 3 to 5x more than Alentejo. Per-acre to per-ha via /0.4047.
appreciation_notes: Kootenay ALR sub-region saw 21.1% decline in farmland values in 2024 mid-year report period, driven by fruit-sector contraction.
source: Farm Credit Canada 2024 Farmland Values Report; Statistics Canada land-value tables; Young Agrarians land listings 2023

price_notes: Quebec provincial average 17720 CAD/acre (~43800 CAD/ha); Estrie/Eastern Townships estimated 8000 to 14000 CAD/acre (~20000 to 35000 CAD/ha) based on regional comparables and FCC commentary on more tempered Eastern Townships pricing vs Monteregie.
appreciation_notes: Quebec farmland values rose +7.7% in 2024 and +4.8% in first half 2025 per FCC.
source: Farm Credit Canada Farmland Values Report 2024
gaps: Estrie-specific figure is an estimate based on regional comparables; no direct FCC Estrie-only mean published in dossier.

price_notes: Private-title rural parcels in highland Oaxaca approximately 3000 to 15000 USD/ha depending on access, improvements, and proximity to Oaxaca City; dossier explicitly flags confidence on price range as LOW and treats as indicative only.
source: RAN (Registro Agrario Nacional) practitioner real-estate guidance 2024; Ley Agraria 1992 / RAN statistics
gaps: No systematic published price series equivalent to European Eurostat data was found. Dossier explicitly states price confidence is LOW. No appreciation rate or YoY data. Majority of Oaxaca's rural territory is communal/ejido land outside private-market pricing entirely.
